creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
Since updating to the latest version of graphics/jpeg, the /x11/kdelibs3 port will no longer build. It continually looks for the "libjpeg.so.9" library which is no longer available.

A copy of the log file is available here:

http://filebin.ca/yrdvkw/kdelibs.log

How-To-Repeat: Attempt to build the port.
